name: forms
description: Serious form management for academy-specific intake — season registrations, medical questionnaires, waiver renewals, custom surveys. Ships THREE owned entities: `Form` (fom_) root, `FormVersion` (fmv_) immutable snapshot per publish, `FormSubmission` (fms_) one completed submission tied to a FormVersion. Sports-native field types (`athlete_data`, `guardian_pair`, `consent_bundle`, `medical_upload`, `team_preference` with age gate, `waiver`, `photo_consent`) — these are the reason the platform builds forms itself rather than delegating to HubSpot / Typeform / Google Forms. Bound to `sports/season` via `season.form_id`: on Season transition to `registration_open`, the bound form goes live at the tenant's public URL. Save-and-resume via signed session URLs. Multi-language + tenant-branded. Bidirectional handoff — a submission carries `handoff_module + handoff_entity_id` (e.g. `registrations::Registration.id`) so the platform can wire form intake into any domain flow. See ADR 0024 (enrollment funnel not a CRM).

attribute_driven.description: Two class-level attributes drive discovery. FieldTypeRegistry + HandoffRegistry hydrated at boot via Foundation's DiscoversAttributes seam. Zero runtime reflection on hot paths.

attributes.AsFormFieldType: Marks a class as a form field type discoverable by FieldTypeRegistry. `#[AsFormFieldType(kind: 'guardian_pair', category: 'sports-native')]`. Provides render + validate + normalize. Built-ins: text / email / phone / date / date_of_birth / number / select / multi_select / boolean / textarea / file_upload / signature / rich_text — plus sports-native: athlete_data / guardian_pair / consent_bundle / medical_upload / team_preference / waiver / photo_consent / emergency_contact.
attributes.AsFormHandoff: Marks a class as a form handoff target discoverable by HandoffRegistry. `#[AsFormHandoff(slug: 'registrations.create_registration', module: 'sports/registrations')]`. Provides map(submissionAnswers) → domainAction. On FormSubmissionCompleted, the bound handoff runs — typically wrapping an atomic domain write (see ADR 0024 for the enrollment convert-on-accept pattern).

handoff_kinds.description: Every form declares zero or one handoff. The handoff's slug references a registered handler; on completion, the handler receives normalised answers + the FormSubmission + fires the appropriate domain action. Handoffs run in the same request cycle when async is not requested; otherwise queued via RunFormHandoffJob.

shipped.description: Season registration intake → creates Registration + attaches trial slot preference if collected.
Standalone waiver update flow (annual re-consent, policy change).
Medical questionnaire → updates athlete clearance record. Async because of OCR on uploaded documents.
Free-form survey with no domain handoff — answers stored on FormSubmission only. Used for feedback surveys, NPS, tenant-specific research.

sports_native_field_types.description: Field types that no external form-builder (Typeform / Google Forms / HubSpot Forms) understands. This is where the module differentiates.

kinds.collects: first_name, last_name, date_of_birth, gender, allergies, medical_conditions, photo_url
primary_guardian(first_name, last_name, email, phone, relationship), secondary_guardian?(same shape)

central.description: PUBLIC form rendering + submission surface. Signed-session-URL guards save-and-resume. Rate limiting on POST to defend against form spam. Anti-CSRF via signed session token, not cookies (public form has no logged-in user).
